abort.migrated_to_groups: The min/max integration has been migrated to use group sensors. Please use the group integration instead.

data_description.round_digits: Controls the number of decimal digits in the output when the statistics characteristic is mean, median or sum.

user.description: Create a sensor that calculates a min, max, mean, median or sum from a list of input sensors.
user.title: [%key:component::min_max::title%]

yaml_deprecated.description:
The min/max integration has been migrated to use group sensor.

Replace your Min/MaxYAML configuration with this converted configuration:
{yaml_config}

To use the new configuration and replace your sensor with a group sensor, restart your Home Assistant.

Group sensors have more configuration possibilities, refer to the documentation by clicking on learn more.
yaml_deprecated.title: Min/Max YAML configuration is deprecated

reload.description: Reloads min/max sensors from the YAML-configuration.
reload.name: Reload min/max sensors

title: Combine the state of several sensors
